title: Pure Immersion
description:
This is Pure Immersion, the ultimate immersive modpack for Minecraft.

This Modpack features sound mods, visual mods & more!

(check the resource packs for the texture pack!)
body:
**!!! CHECK THE RESOURCE PACKS INGAME FOR THE TEXTURE PACK!!!**
**The shader used in the screenshots is Shrimple!**

This is Pure Immersion, the ultimate immersive modpack for Minecraft.

here are some of the features:

You can see your ingame body in first person.
there are 15+ better animations.
a few QOL mods.
Better versions of all structures
100+ new biomes.
some mini structures.
and almost all sounds are replaced to sound even more realistic
